problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monte. Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Theoretical complexity proof with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
